tool_purpose: English NER in Flair (Ontonotes large model). This is the large 18-class NER model for English that ships with Flair. It predicts 18 tags such as cardinal value, date value, event name, building name, geo-political entity, language name, law name, location name, money name, affiliation, ordinal value, organization name, percent value, person name, product name, quantity value, time value, and name of work of art. The model is based on document-level XLM-R embeddings and FLERT. Framework: Flair. Functionality: Named Entity Recognition. API call: SequenceTagger.load('flair/ner-english-ontonotes-large').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
